month.month: The date in YYYY-MM format representing the month and year of the service coverage measurement.

telco.telco: The name of the telecommunications company providing the service.

service_coverage.service_coverage: The percentage of service coverage provided by the telecommunications company for the specified month and year.

year.year: The year in which the activity or program was conducted.

category.category: The broad subject area or type of educational activity or program.

topic.topic: The specific topic or title of the educational activity or program.

level.level: The educational level or target audience for the activity or program.

issuance_agency_id.issuance_agency_id: A placeholder column with no specific meaning.

uen.uen: The Unique Entity Number (UEN) assigned to the business or entity.

registration_incorporation_date.registration_incorporation_date: The date when the business or entity was registered or incorporated.

uen_issue_date.uen_issue_date: The date when the Unique Entity Number (UEN) was issued.
